case_title: WAIN, JILL VS LIGHTNER,MERRIE TURNER IND& DBA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WAIN, JILL AS TO DEFENDANT LIGHTNER,MERRIE TURNER IND& DBA STOCKTON COURT ASSOCIATES LIGHTNER, BILL IND DBA. STOCKTON COURT ASSO. & LIGHTNER PROPERTY GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLFT PHONED TO ASK A CON'T. TO JULY 9. 1999. HER HUSBAND IS IN SURGERY. WILL SENT DOCTORS NOTE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-14-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-28-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAIN, JILL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIGHTNER,MERRIE TURNER IND& DBA STOCKTON COURT ASSOCIATES LIGHTNER, BILL IND DBA. STOCKTON COURT ASSO. & LIGHTNER PROPERTY GROUP $1,719.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,739.00, DEFTS MERRIE TURNER LIGHTNER AND BILL LIGHTNER ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIGHTNER, BILL IND DBA. STOCKTON COURT ASSO.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-02-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-14-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
